impact: Adds the next PP&D permit-process fixture using only existing public fixture source IDs, covering solar workflow facts, documents, file rules, fee/payment gates, corrections, inspections, and confirmation stop points without live crawl or DevHub automation.
summary: Add fixture-only solar permit process skeleton with validation
target_task: Task checkbox-74: Add a fixture-only permit-process skeleton for a solar permit workflow with required facts, required documents, file rules, fee/payment gates, and citation-backed evidence from existing public fixtures only.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
